_comment: Immortal Ghost — Renegade Immortal. A remnant soul that has persisted for centuries. Canon: appears in haunted battlefields and ancient sect ruins. Semi-intangible.
name: Immortal Ghost

canonical.appearance: A translucent, humanoid-shaped wisp of pale blue-white energy. Faintly visible facial features that shift between expressions. Cold aura.
canonical.behavior: Haunts areas of violent death. Attacks by draining spiritual energy (qi). Can phase through walls. Weakened by restriction-based techniques and pure yang fire.
canonical.habitat: Ancient battlefields, destroyed sect ruins, mass-grave sites
canonical.cultivation: Variable — depends on original cultivator's realm before death
canonical.intelligence: 3-5 (fragmented memories of former life, capable of speech)
canonical.diet: Drains qi from living cultivators. Feeds on residual spiritual energy from death sites.
canonical.relationships: Sometimes recognizes former allies/enemies from its living days. Generally hostile to all living beings.
techniques: Qi drain (melee: damages and heals self)
Phase shift (becomes intangible for 3 seconds, immune to physical)
Wail of the dead (AoE slow + fear)
treasures: Ghost Jade (rare, used in soul-recovery techniques)
mutations: Intangible — 50% chance to ignore physical damage; immune to knockback
canonical.ecology: Scavenger of death sites. Does not reproduce — forms from particularly violent or karmically heavy deaths. Rare and localized.

art_direction.model_notes: Translucent humanoid wisp. Floating animation (no walking). Particle trail of cold mist.
art_direction.texture_notes: Semi-transparent blue-white glow. Faintly visible face that shifts. Cold fog particle effect.
